item.title: Midnight in the Median
item.description: A late‑night recovery in the median. What obstacles come with working in the dark?

media:content.media:title: Midnight in the Median
media:content.media:description: A late‑night recovery in the median. What obstacles come with working in the dark?

item.title: NUT Junction Recovery
item.description: A tricky junction becomes the scene of a tough recovery. What made this job so challenging?

media:content.media:title: NUT Junction Recovery
media:content.media:description: A tricky junction becomes the scene of a tough recovery. What made this job so challenging?

item.title: Caught in a Bind? We’ve Got the Unwind
item.description: When vehicles get tangled, recovery crews step in. How do you unwind a bind without causing more damage?

media:content.media:title: Caught in a Bind? We’ve Got the Unwind
media:content.media:description: When vehicles get tangled, recovery crews step in. How do you unwind a bind without causing more damage?

item.title: Up Up & Away
item.description: The recovery takes flight. What happens when heavy equipment has to be lifted sky‑high?

media:content.media:title: Up Up & Away
media:content.media:description: The recovery takes flight. What happens when heavy equipment has to be lifted sky‑high?

item.title: Jackknife Semi Blocking the Roadway!
item.description: A jackknifed semi shuts down traffic. How do you clear the roadway and get things moving again?

media:content.media:title: Jackknife Semi Blocking the Roadway!
media:content.media:description: A jackknifed semi shuts down traffic. How do you clear the roadway and get things moving again?

item.title: Getting Ready for This Load Recovery
item.description: Every recovery starts with preparation. What steps go into gearing up for a heavy‑duty job?

media:content.media:title: Getting Ready for This Load Recovery
media:content.media:description: Every recovery starts with preparation. What steps go into gearing up for a heavy‑duty job?

item.title: Tough Day for Tires: Super Singles in a Soft Shoulder Jam
item.description: Super single tires meet a soft shoulder—and disaster follows. How do you recover when traction disappears?

media:content.media:title: Tough Day for Tires: Super Singles in a Soft Shoulder Jam
media:content.media:description: Super single tires meet a soft shoulder—and disaster follows. How do you recover when traction disappears?

item.title: Epic 220,000 LBS Stuck!
item.description: An unbelievable 220,000 pounds trapped in place. How do you even begin to move a load this massive?

media:content.media:title: Epic 220,000 LBS Stuck!
media:content.media:description: An unbelievable 220,000 pounds trapped in place. How do you even begin to move a load this massive?

item.title: Pull Out Successful
item.description: The recovery ends in success. What challenges had to be overcome to make the pull‑out possible?

media:content.media:title: Pull Out Successful
media:content.media:description: The recovery ends in success. What challenges had to be overcome to make the pull‑out possible?
